test.query: SELECT detectLanguage(SearchPhrase) FROM hits_100m_single WHERE cityHash64(WatchID) % 10 = 0 FORMAT Null
SELECT detectLanguageMixed(SearchPhrase) FROM hits_100m_single WHERE cityHash64(WatchID) % 10 = 0 FORMAT Null
SELECT detectTonality(SearchPhrase) FROM hits_100m_single FORMAT Null
SELECT detectLanguageUnknown(SearchPhrase) FROM hits_100m_single WHERE cityHash64(WatchID) % 200 = 0 FORMAT Null
SELECT detectCharset(SearchPhrase) FROM hits_100m_single WHERE cityHash64(WatchID) % 200 = 0 FORMAT Null
